inzh.title: Engineering & Energy Services — JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII
inzh.intro.label: About the Service
inzh.intro.p1: The engineering and energy services division provides a full range of services including design, equipment supply, facility commissioning and further maintenance for energy and industrial facilities.
inzh.intro.p2: Our team of engineers combines specialists with extensive practical experience in projects of varying complexity — from local industrial power supply to comprehensive modernization of life support systems for large enterprises.
inzh.intro.li3: In-house team of chief project engineers and specialists
inzh.intro.li5: Technical audit and independent expert review
inzh.services.label: Services
inzh.services.title: What We Offer
inzh.svc1.title: Pre-Design Survey
inzh.svc1.desc: Technical audit of existing infrastructure, identification of problem areas, analysis of equipment technical condition. Preparation of a detailed report with recommendations.
inzh.svc2.title: TOR and Feasibility Study
inzh.svc2.desc: Development of technical requirements and feasibility studies for investment decisions. Capital and operational cost estimation.
inzh.svc3.title: Design
inzh.svc3.desc: Development of design and working documentation in accordance with Russian standards (GOST, SP, NP). State expert review.
inzh.svc4.title: Equipment Selection & Supply
inzh.svc4.desc: Technical selection, tendering procedures, supply of electrical and mechanical equipment from leading Russian and international manufacturers.
inzh.svc5.title: Technical & Cost Audit
inzh.svc5.desc: Independent review of design solutions, regulatory compliance monitoring, cost estimate verification.
inzh.svc6.title: Project Management
inzh.svc6.desc: Technical customer and management company functions: contractor coordination, schedule and budget control, construction supervision, commissioning.
inzh.process.label: Work Process
inzh.stage1.title: Initial Consultation
inzh.stage1.desc: Analysis of the customer's task, preliminary assessment of work scope and possible solutions.
inzh.stage2.title: Site Survey
inzh.stage2.desc: Specialist site visit, initial data collection, survey report preparation.
inzh.stage3.title: Concept Development
inzh.stage3.desc: Technical solution preparation, preliminary feasibility study, customer coordination.
inzh.stage4.title: Design & Approval
inzh.stage4.desc: Design documentation development, expert review, permit acquisition.
inzh.stage5.title: Equipment Supply
inzh.stage5.desc: Competitive procedure organization, supply contract conclusion, logistics and incoming inspection.
inzh.stage6.title: Handover & Service
inzh.stage6.desc: Facility commissioning, personnel training, ongoing maintenance services.
inzh.stat1.label: completed engineering projects
inzh.stat2.label: regions of presence
inzh.stat3.label: chief project engineers
inzh.stat4.label: of facilities delivered on time
inzh.cta.title: Shall We Discuss Your Engineering Project?
inzh.cta.desc: Contact our engineers — we will offer the optimal solution of any complexity.
